annotations.note: Registered scripts will only be applied to newly opened message composer tabs. To apply the script to already open message composer tab, manually inject your script by calling $(ref:tabs.executeScript) for each of the open <var>messageCompose</var> tabs.

annotations.text: Inject the script after the document is created, but before any other content is loaded.
Inject the script after the DOM is complete, but before subresources like images and frames have loaded.
Inject the script after the page is fully loaded. This is the default.

annotations.note: Registered scripts will only be applied to newly opened messages. To apply the script to already open messages, manually inject your script by calling $(ref:tabs.executeScript) for each of the open <var>messageDisplay</var> tabs.
